body:
**<sub><sub>![P2 Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/P2-yellow?style=flat)</sub></sub>  Clear stale AVR model when changing receiver brand**

If a user selects a receiver model, goes back to the brand screen, and chooses a different brand, this only updates `avrBrand`; the previous `avrModel`/`avrBackend` remain set. On the new brand's model screen, `FooterNav` enables “Continue to test” whenever `state.avrModel` is truthy, so the user can continue with a mismatched brand/model/backend (for example Yamaha brand with a Denon backend) without selecting a Yamaha model. Clear the model/backend fields when the brand changes, as the player brand picker already does for `playerModel`.

Useful? React with 👍 / 👎.
